*ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- PLAINTIFF GLENDA WILLIAMS' Motion (for injunctive relief) to close national furniture liquadators to be inspected by the San Francisco County Environmental Health Department to inspect for bed bugs is denied.
